description: Merge all markdown files in current directory with trailing newline
command: for f in *.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && cat "$f" && printf '\n'; done > merged.md

description: Remove lines starting with '# chapter_' from all markdown files
Display ARP table for local network devices
Rename chapter files to 3-digit zero-padded format
command: for f in chapter-*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; n=${f#chapter-}; n=${n%.md}; [ ${#n} -lt 3 ] && printf -v nn '%03d' "$n" && mv -i -- "$f" "chapter-${nn}.md"; done

description: Merge 5 random markdown files into demo.txt
Merge 10 random markdown files into demo.txt
Query Gemini API (requires API_KEY env var)
Show diff between current branch and remote main
Find markdown files containing blockquote lines
Preview removal of blockquote lines (dry run)
Remove all blockquote lines from markdown files

command: file -- "Shut Up, Young Lady, Obediently Hand Over The Money And Don't Confess.epub"
gh repo list --limit 4000 --json nameWithOwner,collaborators --jq '.[] | select(.collaborators | length > 0) | "\(.nameWithOwner): \(.collaborators | map(.login) | join(", "))"'

prompt: merge random 10 markdown files in current folder to demo.txt
get current date follow form year_month_day
use fd show all file vtt
show all branch in github remote
